evidence.rustSymbol: pub fn format_size(size: i64, format: SizeFormat) -> String { let (base, units) = match (format.unit, format.style) { ... }; let negative = size < 0; let abs_size = size.unsigned_abs(); ... while value >= base && unit_idx < units.len() - 1 { ... } }
evidence.csharpSymbol: public static string FormatSize(long size, SizeFormat format) { var (base_, units) = GetUnits(format.Unit, format.Style); var negative = size < 0; var absSize = ...; ... while (value >= base_ && unitIdx < units.Length - 1) { ... } }
evidence.note: Core formatting algorithm ported with equivalent logic: match on unit×style, handle negation, scale by base in a loop, format with precision.

caveats: None. The C# file substantively ports the Rust file's public API and core formatting behavior. Minor adaptations for C# idioms (PascalCase, record struct, CLS-compliant overloads for ulong) are expected and appropriate in a language port.
